languages.text: {n}Ваши офицеры хватаются за оружие, ошарашенно озираясь. Тразин едко смеется.{/n} "Твои подданные не в силах навредить тому, чего нет. Ты видишь и слышишь лишь проекцию, порожденную моим вмешательством в работу твоего мозга. Смирись с моим присутствием — отныне ты стал{mf||а} моим наблюдателем".

{n}Your officers reach for their weapons and look around in surprise. Trazyn laughs acerbically.{/n} "Your subjects have no power to harm what is not there. You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."
languages.original_text: {n}Ваши офицеры хватаются за оружие, ошарашенно озираясь. Тразин едко смеется.{/n} "Твои подданные не в силах навредить тому, чего нет. Ты видишь и слышишь лишь проекцию, порожденную моим вмешательством в работу твоего мозга. Смирись с моим присутствием — отныне ты стал{mf||а} моим наблюдателем".

You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."

languages.text: {n}Tus oficiales llevan la mano a sus armas y miran a su alrededor, sorprendidos. Trazyn se ríe con aspereza.{/n} «Tus súbditos no pueden herir a lo que no está allí. Tan solo ves y escuchas una proyección generada por los cambios que he realizado en tu cerebro. Acepta mi presencia: a partir de ahora, serás mis ojos».
languages.original_text: {n}Your officers reach for their weapons and look around in surprise. Trazyn laughs acerbically.{/n} "Your subjects have no power to harm what is not there. You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus oficiales llevan la mano a sus armas y miran a su alrededor, sorprendidos. Trazyn se ríe con aspereza.{/n} «Tus súbditos no pueden herir a lo que no está allí. Tan solo ves y escuchas una proyección generada por los cambios que he realizado en tu cerebro. Acepta mi presencia: a partir de ahora, serás mis ojos».

languages.text: {n}你的军官们纷纷握住武器，惊疑不定地四下张望。特拉金尖刻地笑了起来。{/n}“你的臣民可伤不到本就不存在的事物。你的所见所闻，不过是我干涉你的大脑后生成的投影。接受我的存在吧——从现在起，你将充当我的‘观察视角’。”
languages.original_text: {n}Your officers reach for their weapons and look around in surprise. Trazyn laughs acerbically.{/n} "Your subjects have no power to harm what is not there. You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: {n}你的军官们纷纷握住武器，惊疑不定地四下张望。特拉金尖刻地笑了起来。{/n}“你的臣民可伤不到本就不存在的事物。你的所见所闻，不过是我干涉你的大脑后生成的投影。接受我的存在吧——从现在起，你将充当我的‘观察视角’。”

languages.text: {n}Vos officiers sortent leurs armes en lançant des regards surpris autour d'eux tandis que Trazyn éclate d'un rire acerbe.{/n} « Vos sujets ne peuvent pas atteindre ce qui n'est pas là. Vous ne voyez et n'entendez qu'une projection générée par les modifications que j'ai apportées à votre cerveau. Acceptez ma présence. Désormais, vous me servirez de fenêtre sur votre vie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Your officers reach for their weapons and look around in surprise. Trazyn laughs acerbically.{/n} "Your subjects have no power to harm what is not there. You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos officiers sortent leurs armes en lançant des regards surpris autour d'eux tandis que Trazyn éclate d'un rire acerbe.{/n} « Vos sujets ne peuvent pas atteindre ce qui n'est pas là. Vous ne voyez et n'entendez qu'une projection générée par les modifications que j'ai apportées à votre cerveau. Acceptez ma présence. Désormais, vous me servirez de fenêtre sur votre vie. »

languages.text: {n}Subayların, silahlarına davranıp şaşkınlıkla etraflarına bakınıyor. Trazyn acı acı gülüyor.{/n} "Tebaanın orada olmayan bir şeye zarar vermeye gücü yetmez. Sen sadece beynine yaptığım müdahalenin yarattığı bir projeksiyonu görüyor ve duyuyorsun. Varlığımı kabul et. Bundan sonra benim bakış açım olarak hizmet edeceksin."
languages.original_text: {n}Your officers reach for their weapons and look around in surprise. Trazyn laughs acerbically.{/n} "Your subjects have no power to harm what is not there. You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: {n}Subayların, silahlarına davranıp şaşkınlıkla etraflarına bakınıyor. Trazyn acı acı gülüyor.{/n} "Tebaanın orada olmayan bir şeye zarar vermeye gücü yetmez. Sen sadece beynine yaptığım müdahalenin yarattığı bir projeksiyonu görüyor ve duyuyorsun. Varlığımı kabul et. Bundan sonra benim bakış açım olarak hizmet edeceksin."

languages.text: {n}あなたの兵士たちは武器を取り、驚いて周囲を見渡す。トラズンは皮肉を込めて笑う。{/n}「あなたの部下たちは存在しないものを傷つける力はない。あなたは私の脳への干渉によって生み出された幻影のみを目と耳で捉えている。私の存在を受け入れよ。これからお前たちは私の視点となる。」
languages.original_text: {n}Your officers reach for their weapons and look around in surprise. Trazyn laughs acerbically.{/n} "Your subjects have no power to harm what is not there. You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの兵士たちは武器を取り、驚いて周囲を見渡す。トラズンは皮肉を込めて笑う。{/n}「あなたの部下たちは存在しないものを傷つける力はない。あなたは私の脳への干渉によって生み出された幻影のみを目と耳で捉えている。私の存在を受け入れよ。これからお前たちは私の視点となる。」

languages.text: {n}Deine Offiziere greifen nach ihren Waffen und sehen sich überrascht um. Trazyn lacht beißend.{/n} "Deine Subjekte können nichts verletzen, das nicht hier ist. Du siehst und hörst nur eine Projektion, die ich in deinem Gehirn erzeuge. Akzeptiere meine Gegenwart ... ab sofort bist du mein Beobachtungspunkt."
languages.original_text: {n}Your officers reach for their weapons and look around in surprise. Trazyn laughs acerbically.{/n} "Your subjects have no power to harm what is not there. You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."
